// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using OpenTelemetry.Trace;
using TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData;

namespace TraceUtils.Extensions;

public static class AllSignaturesMethodsGroupedTelemetryExtensions
{
    public static void VoidNoParamsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("VoidNoParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"VoidNoParams\""));
                instance.VoidNoParams();

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"VoidNoParams\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.VoidNoParams();
        }
    }

    public static int SyncWithReturnWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("SyncWithReturn", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try

                return instance.SyncWithReturn();

            }
            catch (Exception ex)

                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"SyncWithReturn\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return instance.SyncWithReturn();
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task AsyncTaskWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncTask", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"AsyncTask\""));
                await instance.AsyncTask();

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"AsyncTask\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            await instance.AsyncTask();
        }
    }

    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncTaskWithResult", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))

            catch (Exception ex)

                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;

            finally

                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"AsyncTaskWithResult\""));
            }
        }
        else

            return await instance.AsyncTaskWithResult();
        }
    }

    public static void PrimitiveTagsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int intVal, long longVal, double doubleVal, decimal decimalVal, bool boolVal, string stringVal, char charVal)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("PrimitiveTags", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.int", intVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.long", longVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.double", doubleVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.decimal", decimalVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.bool", boolVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.string", stringVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.char", charVal);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"PrimitiveTags\""));
                instance.PrimitiveTags(intVal, longVal, doubleVal, decimalVal, boolVal, stringVal, charVal);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"PrimitiveTags\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.PrimitiveTags(intVal, longVal, doubleVal, decimalVal, boolVal, stringVal, charVal);
        }
    }

    public static void PrimitiveDefaultsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int count = 10, string name = "default", bool enabled = true)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("PrimitiveDefaults", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.count", count);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.name", name);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.enabled", enabled);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"PrimitiveDefaults\""));
                instance.PrimitiveDefaults(count, name, enabled);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"PrimitiveDefaults\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.PrimitiveDefaults(count, name, enabled);
        }
    }

    public static void DateTimeTagsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, DateTime date, DateTimeOffset dateOffset, DateOnly dateOnly, TimeOnly timeOnly)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("DateTimeTags", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.date", date.ToString("O"));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.dateOffset", dateOffset.ToString("O"));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.dateOnly", dateOnly.ToString("O"));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.timeOnly", timeOnly.ToString("O"));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"DateTimeTags\""));
                instance.DateTimeTags(date, dateOffset, dateOnly, timeOnly);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"DateTimeTags\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.DateTimeTags(date, dateOffset, dateOnly, timeOnly);
        }
    }

    public static void DateTimeInWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, in DateTime timestamp)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("DateTimeIn", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.timestamp", timestamp.ToString("O"));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"DateTimeIn\""));
                instance.DateTimeIn(in timestamp);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"DateTimeIn\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.DateTimeIn(in timestamp);
        }
    }

    {

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))

            activity?.SetTag("tag.dateOffset", dateOffset?.ToString("O"));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.dateOnly", dateOnly?.ToString("O"));

            catch (Exception ex)

    {

            activity?.SetTag("tag.correlationId", correlationId?.ToString());

            catch (Exception ex)

                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GuidTags\""));

    public static void EnumTagsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind kind, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind? nullableKind, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind defaultKind = TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind.Internal)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("EnumTags", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.kind", kind);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.nullableKind", nullableKind);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.defaultKind", defaultKind);
            try

                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"EnumTags\""));
                instance.EnumTags(kind, nullableKind, defaultKind);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"EnumTags\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.EnumTags(kind, nullableKind, defaultKind);
        }
    }

    public static void TimeSpanTagsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TimeSpan duration, TimeSpan? timeout)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("TimeSpanTags", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))

            activity?.SetTag("tag.timeout", timeout);
            try

                instance.TimeSpanTags(duration, timeout);

    public static void ArraySerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, byte[] bytes, int[] ids, string[] names)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("ArraySerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.bytes", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(bytes));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.ids", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(ids));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.names", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(names));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"ArraySerialize\""));
                instance.ArraySerialize(bytes, ids, names);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"ArraySerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.ArraySerialize(bytes, ids, names);
        }
    }

    {

        }
    }

    public static void GenericCollectionSerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, List<int> list, Dictionary<string, int> dict, IEnumerable<string> enumerable, IReadOnlyList<long> readonlyList)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericCollectionSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.list", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(list));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.dict", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(dict));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.enumerable", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(enumerable));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.readonlyList", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(readonlyList));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"GenericCollectionSerialize\""));
                instance.GenericCollectionSerialize(list, dict, enumerable, readonlyList);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GenericCollectionSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.GenericCollectionSerialize(list, dict, enumerable, readonlyList);
        }
    }

    public static void GenericCollectionNoSerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, List<int> list, Dictionary<string, int> dict, IEnumerable<string> enumerable)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericCollectionNoSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try

                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"GenericCollectionNoSerialize\""));
                instance.GenericCollectionNoSerialize(list, dict, enumerable);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)

                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;

            finally

                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GenericCollectionNoSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.GenericCollectionNoSerialize(list, dict, enumerable);
        }
    }

    public static void ClassSerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto profile, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto? nullableProfile)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("ClassSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.profile", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(profile));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.nullableProfile", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(nullableProfile));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"ClassSerialize\""));
                instance.ClassSerialize(profile, nullableProfile);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"ClassSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.ClassSerialize(profile, nullableProfile);
        }
    }

    public static void StructSerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coords, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto? nullableCoords)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("StructSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.coords", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(coords));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.nullableCoords", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(nullableCoords));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"StructSerialize\""));
                instance.StructSerialize(coords, nullableCoords);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"StructSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.StructSerialize(coords, nullableCoords);
        }
    }

    public static void StructNoSerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coords, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto? nullableCoords)
    {

        }

    public static void MixedTagsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int id, string name, DateTime date, Guid guid, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind kind, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto profile, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coords, int[] ids, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto skipProfile, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto skipCoords, int[] skipIds)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("MixedTags", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.id", id);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.name", name);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.date", date.ToString("O"));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.guid", guid.ToString());
            activity?.SetTag("tag.kind", kind);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.profile", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(profile));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.coords", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(coords));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.ids", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(ids));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"MixedTags\""));
                instance.MixedTags(id, name, date, guid, kind, profile, coords, ids, skipProfile, skipCoords, skipIds);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"MixedTags\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.MixedTags(id, name, date, guid, kind, profile, coords, ids, skipProfile, skipCoords, skipIds);
        }
    }

    public static T GenericMethodWithTrace<T>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, T input)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericMethod", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.input", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(input));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"GenericMethod\""));
                return instance.GenericMethod<T>(input);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GenericMethod\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return instance.GenericMethod<T>(input);
        }
    }

    public static T GenericMethodNoSerializeWithTrace<T>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, T input)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericMethodNoSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"GenericMethodNoSerialize\""));
                return instance.GenericMethodNoSerialize<T>(input);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GenericMethodNoSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return instance.GenericMethodNoSerialize<T>(input);
        }
    }

    public static void GenericWithConstraintsWithTrace<T>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, T entity)
        where T : class, new()
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericWithConstraints", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.entity", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(entity));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"GenericWithConstraints\""));
                instance.GenericWithConstraints<T>(entity);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GenericWithConstraints\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.GenericWithConstraints<T>(entity);
        }
    }

    public static TOutput GenericMultipleTypesWithTrace<TInput, TOutput>(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TInput source)
        where TOutput : TInput
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("GenericMultipleTypes", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.source", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(source));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"GenericMultipleTypes\""));
                return instance.GenericMultipleTypes<TInput, TOutput>(source);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"GenericMultipleTypes\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return instance.GenericMultipleTypes<TInput, TOutput>(source);
        }
    }

    public static void RefParametersWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, in int inVal, ref int refVal, out int outVal)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("RefParameters", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.inVal", inVal);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.refVal", refVal);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"RefParameters\""));
                instance.RefParameters(in inVal, ref refVal, out outVal);
                activity?.SetTag("tag.outVal", outVal);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"RefParameters\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.RefParameters(in inVal, ref refVal, out outVal);
        }
    }

    public static void InDateTimeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, in DateTime date)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("InDateTime", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.date", date.ToString("O"));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"InDateTime\""));
                instance.InDateTime(in date);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"InDateTime\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.InDateTime(in date);
        }
    }

    public static void InStructWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, in TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto coords)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("InStruct", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.coords", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(coords));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"InStruct\""));
                instance.InStruct(in coords);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"InStruct\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.InStruct(in coords);
        }
    }

    public static void NoTagParamsWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int noTagInt, string noTagString, int withTag)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("NoTagParams", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.withTag", withTag);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"NoTagParams\""));
                instance.NoTagParams(noTagInt, noTagString, withTag);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"NoTagParams\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.NoTagParams(noTagInt, noTagString, withTag);
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task CancellationOnlyWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("CancellationOnly", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"CancellationOnly\""));
                await instance.CancellationOnly(cancellationToken);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"CancellationOnly\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            await instance.CancellationOnly(cancellationToken);
        }
    }

    public static void ParamsArrayWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string operation, int[] values)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("ParamsArray", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.operation", operation);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.values", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(values));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"ParamsArray\""));
                instance.ParamsArray(operation, values);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"ParamsArray\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.ParamsArray(operation, values);
        }
    }

    public static void ParamsArrayNoSerializeWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string operation, int[] values)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("ParamsArrayNoSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.operation", operation);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"ParamsArrayNoSerialize\""));
                instance.ParamsArrayNoSerialize(operation, values);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"ParamsArrayNoSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.ParamsArrayNoSerialize(operation, values);
        }
    }

    public static (bool success, string message) TupleReturnWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string input)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("TupleReturn", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.input", input);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"TupleReturn\""));
                return instance.TupleReturn(input);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"TupleReturn\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return instance.TupleReturn(input);
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<(int count, DateTime lastUpdate)> AsyncTupleReturnWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string filter)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("AsyncTupleReturn", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.filter", filter);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"AsyncTupleReturn\""));
                return await instance.AsyncTupleReturn(filter);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"AsyncTupleReturn\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return await instance.AsyncTupleReturn(filter);
        }
    }

    public static void NullablePrimitivesWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, int? nullableInt, long? nullableLong, short? nullableShort, byte? nullableByte, bool? nullableBool, char? nullableChar, double? nullableDouble, float? nullableFloat, decimal? nullableDecimal)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("NullablePrimitives", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.int", nullableInt);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.long", nullableLong);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.short", nullableShort);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.byte", nullableByte);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.bool", nullableBool);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.char", nullableChar);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.double", nullableDouble);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.float", nullableFloat);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.decimal", nullableDecimal);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"NullablePrimitives\""));
                instance.NullablePrimitives(nullableInt, nullableLong, nullableShort, nullableByte, nullableBool, nullableChar, nullableDouble, nullableFloat, nullableDecimal);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"NullablePrimitives\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.NullablePrimitives(nullableInt, nullableLong, nullableShort, nullableByte, nullableBool, nullableChar, nullableDouble, nullableFloat, nullableDecimal);
        }
    }

    public static void NullableTimeSpanWithTrace(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, TimeSpan? duration)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("NullableTimeSpan", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.duration", duration);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"NullableTimeSpan\""));
                instance.NullableTimeSpan(duration);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"NullableTimeSpan\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            instance.NullableTimeSpan(duration);
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task<string> ClientActivityWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string url, string method)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("UnknownOperation", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.url", url);
            activity?.SetTag("tag.method", method);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"UnknownOperation\""));
                return await instance.ClientActivity(url, method);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"UnknownOperation\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            return await instance.ClientActivity(url, method);
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task WithDelegatesWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, string data, Action<string> callback, Func<string, System.Threading.Tasks.Task<int>>? asyncCallback = null)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("WithDelegates", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.data", data);
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"WithDelegates\""));
                await instance.WithDelegates(data, callback, asyncCallback);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"WithDelegates\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            await instance.WithDelegates(data, callback, asyncCallback);
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task CustomTypeCollectionsWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, List<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto> profiles, IReadOnlyList<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto> coordsList, Dictionary<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.UserKind, TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto> kindDict)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("CustomTypeCollections", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {
            activity?.SetTag("tag.profiles", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(profiles));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.coordsList", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(coordsList));
            activity?.SetTag("tag.kindDict", System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(kindDict));
            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"CustomTypeCollections\""));
                await instance.CustomTypeCollections(profiles, coordsList, kindDict);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"CustomTypeCollections\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            await instance.CustomTypeCollections(profiles, coordsList, kindDict);
        }
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task CustomTypeCollectionsNoSerializeWithTraceAsync(this IAllSignaturesMethodsGrouped instance, List<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.ProfileDto> profiles, IReadOnlyList<TraceUtils.SourceGenerator.Tests.TestData.CoordinatesDto> coordsList)
    {
        using var activity = Utils.StartActivity("CustomTypeCollectionsNoSerialize", ActivityKind.Internal);

        if (Utils.ShouldRecordData(activity))
        {

            try
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Начало события \"CustomTypeCollectionsNoSerialize\""));
                await instance.CustomTypeCollectionsNoSerialize(profiles, coordsList);

            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                activity?.SetStatus(ActivityStatusCode.Error, ex.Message);
                activity?.AddException(ex);
                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.AddEvent(new ActivityEvent("Конец события \"CustomTypeCollectionsNoSerialize\""));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            await instance.CustomTypeCollectionsNoSerialize(profiles, coordsList);
        }
    }

}
